insight: Iter204 is an active post-infrastructure-null/pre-scientific-output recovery over the immutable iter202/iter203 corpus. It changes only the separately versioned infrastructure needed to set local-driver compress=false, prove that exact logging tuple with an inert no-science smoke gate, and retain bounded failure diagnostics. No certification, scenario, adjudication, judge, N, k, u, or rate result exists yet.
next_action: Complete and adversarially review the iter204 runtime, smoke receipt, diagnostic retention, collector, workflow authorization, tests, and new runtime manifest; require green primary CI; then make the first global iter204 dispatch on the approved commit and accept only run attempt 1 as a complete same-attempt eight-shard corpus. Any failure must be published as a null and requires a new iteration, never a rerun or second dispatch.
